prompt: Subject: a woman painting a self-portrait / outdoor artist portrait. Person/Expression: A young woman with black hair in a messy bun, delicate wisps of hair, natural makeup, transparent skin, focused profile, a serious yet soft gaze at the self-portrait. Clothing/Pose: a white sleeveless top and navy blue overalls stained with paint, white sneakers, sitting on a small wooden stool, holding a palette and brush while painting a mural, some paint on her arm. Background/Light: An outdoor studio space in a Japanese alley, wooden walls, a large mural of her own self-portrait, a quiet corner with plants and signs, a cute puppy at her feet, soft afternoon natural light. Composition/Camera: Vertical, environmental portrait, 35mm lens, natural depth of field with the background softly blurred. Texture/Style: High definition, 4K, natural skin texture, realistic paint thickness, soft tones, cinematic light, magazine-style finish. Negative: Low quality, unnatural face/hands, extra fingers, distorted gaze, over-processed skin, logos, text.
